title: Henry Aldrich Plays Cupid
writer: Muriel Roy Bolton, Val Burton, Aleen Leslie
actors: Jimmy Lydon, Charles Smith, John Litel
plot: Henry Aldrich (James Lydon) tries to match his unfriendly teacher, Mr. Bradley (vaughan Glaser) with a wife. Henry hopes the teacher will become friendly enough to let him graduate with honors so he can use an inheritance for coll...
